component.name: Top Header
component.description: App top bar: brand / section titles, actions (profile, inbox, back, close, edit), optional subtitle. Frame width **393**; vertical size hugs content (no fixed header min-heights).

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Top Header (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.title: top-header-title
figmaLayerNames.subtitle: top-header-subtitle
figmaLayerNames.inboxIconInstance: top-header-inbox-icon (instance of `Inbox icon` component set Default `786:15`; badge from nested `inbox-icon-badge` / `inbox-icon-badge-value`)

notes: Trailing action is a single instance of the shared `Inbox icon` component (`786:16`); master `Default` shows the unread badge.
Badge count uses Body-Small weight 600 via nested Inbox icon layers; `InboxIcon` in code mirrors those layers.

findings.detail: Title + Inbox variant: one layer keeps a fully transparent fill for the inbox control hit target; not mapped to a color token by design.

2026-04-08: Figma cleanup aligned with design-system conventions — `COMPONENT_SET` uses vertical auto layout (16px gap) between variant masters. Structural layers use `top-header-*` kebab-case (`top-header-accent-strip`, `top-header-content`, `top-header-title`, `top-header-leading-action` / `top-header-trailing-action`, `top-header-subtitle`, plus variant-specific trailing content). Title Only: removed stray empty placeholder control; title row uses auto layout (no absolute-positioned title). Accent strip node remains where variants omit the bar but is hidden (`visible: false`) so layout height stays consistent; vectors left un-flattened in automation.

2026-04-08: `Title + Inbox` (`236:879`) — replaced separate `top-header-icon` + `top-header-badge` vector frames with an instance of the shared `Inbox icon` component (`786:15` Default) named `top-header-inbox-icon` under `top-header-trailing-action` (`236:872`). TSX uses `InboxIcon` from `inbox-icon/` for parity.

2026-04-11: Figma `231:817` — frame **393** wide; header height **hugs** content (removed fixed `minHeight` table). `data-name` on `top-header-content`, `top-header-accent-strip`, `top-header-leading-action`, `top-header-trailing-action`, `top-header-icon`, `top-header-title`, `top-header-subtitle`; **Title Only** row matches EARNINGS flex layout; **X (Close & Edit)** EDIT control uses **14px** pencil + `boxSizing`.

resolved: Solid fills and strokes bound to canonical Color Styles variables where applicable.
Text layers bound to Typography variables (Display-H1, Body, Body-Small) where sizes match tokens.
Inbox badge uses Brand/Primary; edit pill uses Semantic/Status/Error BG and text tokens.
recommendations: Optional: replace Inter on the small inbox badge number with Ubuntu Sans Mono Bold for full monospace alignment.
Optional: add explicit spacing tokens for 6px accent height and 10px gaps if you want everything on-scale.
